content.title: Git Repository Optimization Suite
content.short_description: Performance tuning suite for large repositories.
content.description: This project provides a comprehensive suite of shell scripts designed to optimize Git repositories by cleaning up unnecessary data, reducing repository size, and improving performance. The scripts are specifically tailored for automated maintenance workflows, with integration for Minecraft server notifications via tmux sessions.
content.role: I developed a collection of specialized Git optimization scripts that handle different levels of repository cleanup. The scripts include aggressive garbage collection, standard pruning, repacking operations, and commit history management. Each script is designed with automated execution in mind, featuring progress notifications and integration with tmux sessions for real-time status updates to users.

achievements: Significantly reduced Git repository storage footprint through aggressive cleanup operations
Improved repository performance and cloning speeds for large codebases
Automated maintenance workflows with real-time user notifications
Provided multiple optimization levels (standard, aggressive, repack) for different use cases
Enabled safe rollback capabilities with soft reset functionality
technologies: File system operations and disk usage monitoring

screenshots: Terminal output showing before/after repository sizes
